No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly prepares students to become qualified secondary school teachers, focusing on pedagogical skills, curriculum design, and practical teaching experience, central to Target 4.1 and 4.c.
evidence: 引導學生增強自身的教學專業知能
Possess practical teaching experiences and skills

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly prepares students for the teaching profession, providing practical skills and guidance for teacher recruitment exams, contributing to decent work (Target 8.5).
evidence: Possess practical teaching experiences and skills

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes professional ethics and the study of educational regulations, foundational for developing effective, accountable, and transparent educational institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 具備處理行政事務的基本操守與溝通能力

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course promotes knowledge sharing through seminars with in-service teachers and former interns, fostering multi-stakeholder partnerships for professional development (Target 17.16).
evidence: 與在職教師、實習教師之座談
